typography.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black uppercase text-text_primary

layout.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for containers to give text breathing room.
layout.grid_system: Swiss Grid / Bento combinations. Heavily utilize 1px borders (border-collapse style) to divide sections.

hero.style: Text-heavy, full viewport height. Massive uppercase headings taking up the entire screen. Minimalist, no photo.

about.style: Editorial style reading experience. Asymmetrical grid placing large text block on one side and the abstract architectural image on the other.

skills.style: Brutalist tags with 1px borders and sharp corners, or a dense typographic grid.

experience.style: Minimalist list with clear optical alignment. High-contrast typography for roles vs dates. 1px bottom borders separating items.

projects.style: Grid with sharp borders, flat surfaces, no drop shadows. Use the abstract image as a visual placeholder.

contact.style: Massive 'LET'S TALK' text taking up the footer width. High-contrast email link.

image_urls.description: Abstract minimalist concrete architecture. Use in the About section to metaphorically represent structure, operations, and business architecture.
Black and white architectural geometry. Use as a placeholder for project thumbnails or visual breaks.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Adhere to Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Light theme. Do not invent a new theme.
CRITICAL: Use 'Outfit' for all headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Import them via Google Fonts in index.css or index.html.
CRITICAL: Do NOT use a photo of the person. The user explicitly requested to skip the photo. Use the provided abstract images instead to create a high-end corporate feel.

Hero section should be purely typographic. Use massive font sizes (`text-5xl sm:text-6xl`) to make words like 'OPERATIONS', 'SALES', and 'BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT' visually dominant. Break the text into staggered lines.

Do not use generic soft shadows (`shadow-md`, `shadow-lg`). Use sharp edges (`rounded-none` or `rounded-sm`), 1px borders (`border-border`), and flat surfaces. This is a brutalist-inspired Swiss design.
Implement `data-testid` attributes on all interactive elements (links, buttons, etc).
Include placeholder links for LinkedIn, GitHub, and Resume download.
The Contact section must feature the mailto:tshatakshi641@gmail.com link prominently, potentially with oversized text.
Use Lucide-React for icons, keeping them minimal and stroke-based (stroke-width 1.5).
